title: Round Trees Tops
description: More like vanilla Minecraft rounded 32×32 logs
body:
## Beautiful round logs 
Have you ever wanted to make wood look a little more realistic while retaining the vanilla style of Minecraft with 32x32 textures?

This resource pack make the top of the logs more rounded. It supports **all types of wood**, so it's time to enjoy building. It is fully available in **32x32 resolution** and does not add anything else.
### Here is an example of what it looks like:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b25c324ca573d8e7937df725beb7a7285aa6a6b.png)

</details>

## Thank you for your choice🌳
P.S: This is my first resource pack, so I would appreciate your feedback and downloads.
